Package org.areslib.diagnostics

Class SystemCheckCommand

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.command.Command
org.areslib.command.SequentialCommandGroup
org.areslib.diagnostics.SystemCheckCommand
public class SystemCheckCommand extends SequentialCommandGroup
A comprehensive, robust pre-match diagnostic routine decoupled from mechanism logic.

Takes any number of SystemTestable objects and sequences them sequentially, starting with a Battery Voltage Gate to ensure physical capability.

This ensures all robot hardware is functioning before match time, preventing mid-match failures.

    • isFinished

      public boolean isFinished()
      Description copied from class: Command
      Whether the command has finished. Once a command finishes, the scheduler will call its end() method and un-schedule it.
      Overrides:
      isFinished in class SequentialCommandGroup
      Returns:
      whether the command has finished.

    • end

      public void end(boolean interrupted)
      Description copied from class: Command
      The action to take when the command ends. Called when either the command finishes normally, or when it interrupted.
      Overrides:
      end in class SequentialCommandGroup
      Parameters:
      interrupted - whether the command was interrupted/canceled
